ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_type_id" TEXT /* Reference to the type of the component */,
  "bolt_pattern_long" REAL /* Length of the bolt pattern */,
  "bolt_pattern_wide" REAL /* Width of the bolt pattern */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the component */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the component (Yes/No) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the component */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was manufactured */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each component */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the component */,
  "quality_status" TEXT /* Quality status of the component */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last quality inspection */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the last quality inspection */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the component in the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_component_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("component_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "component_type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component type */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category for more detailed categorization */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Industry standard the component type adheres to */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications the component type has */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the component type was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the component type was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the component type */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the component type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "client" TEXT /* Client for the project */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date of the project */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the project */,
  "project_notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "component_id" TEXT /* ID of the component being assigned */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the component is assigned to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the component was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the component */,
  "estimated_usage_date" TEXT /* Estimated date when the component will be used */,
  "actual_usage_date" TEXT /* Actual date when the component was used */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the usage of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_assignments_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "component_id" TEXT /* ID of the component */,
  "current_quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level to trigger a new order */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the component is stored */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the component */,
  "last_inventory_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  "next_inventory_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the next inventory check */,
  "inventory_notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "component_id" TEXT /* ID of the component */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., Design, Manufacturing, Quality Control) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "document_author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  "document_approver" TEXT /* User who approved the document */,
  "document审批_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_documents_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Engineer, Project Manager, Admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the company */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" TEXT /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the component */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the component (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" TEXT /* ID of the component */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the version was not approved */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
